name: peru-wildfire-analysis
description: Download, aggregate, and visualize NASA VIIRS wildfire data for Peru by department.

tools.name: download_viirs_snpp_peru
tools.description: Download NASA FIRMS VIIRS-SNPP fire detections for Peru for a given year.

tools.name: fires_clean
tools.description: Convert downloaded fire data into a GeoDataFrame with geometry.

tools.name: download_ctry_shp
tools.description: Download Peru department boundary polygons from GADM.

tools.name: intersect_and_collapse_fires_peru
tools.description: Spatially join fires with boundaries and aggregate fire counts.

tools.name: plot_fires_choropleth_peru
tools.description: Render a static choropleth PNG of fire counts by department.

tools.name: analyze_peru_fires
tools.description: Run the full pipeline (download, clean, boundaries, aggregate) for a year in one call.
